rationale: Docs build tooling: enforcing a specific Sphinx version in conf.py; no driver behavior or spec.
Build/linking bug: shm_open in mongoc-stat.c compiled unconditionally despite --disable-shm-counters flag.
Implementation improvement: writev may not send full isMaster message; no specific spec rule contradicted.
Coverity static-analysis defect: unchecked return value in GridFS BSON init; internal code quality.
Coverity resource-leak defect in cursor opts parsing; internal memory management, not a spec rule.
CMake build system feature parity with Autotools: bundled BSON support; no spec behavior involved.
SDAM spec scanning-order pseudo-code says abort early if no nodes to scan; driver blocks for minHeartbeatFrequencyMS instead.
Write concern spec defines valid w values (>=0 or 'majority'); driver accidentally accepted negative internal sentinel values w<-1.
Sessions spec: 'all subsequent GETMORE commands MUST be run using the same session ID'; implicit session not guaranteed for getMores.
Performance regression investigation from Autotools-to-CMake benchmark build change; no spec behavior.
Dropping MongoDB 2.6 support: bump minWireVersion and remove legacy code; version-support policy, not spec conformance.
CMake OpenSSL include-path handling on macOS; build-system improvement with no spec behavior.
C API documentation gap for mongoc_gridfs_find_one error-setting postcondition; not the cross-driver GridFS spec.
Assert failure in handshake metadata formatting on long platform strings; implementation crash, no spec rule.
Regression bug: $gleStats field mistakenly treated as cursor option; implementation detail, no spec rule contradicted.
Merging internal test binaries (test-libbson into test-libmongoc); build/test reorganization, not spec tests.
Improvement to implement a sessions spec change (SPEC-1030); driver wasn't wrong before spec changed, proactive rollout.
Memory leaks in JSON parser for DBPointer/code-with-scope; internal resource management, no spec rule.
CRUD spec: collation must be inside each delete entry; driver sent it as command-level option or omitted it entirely.
Memory leaks in DarwinSSL/SecureTransport SSL implementation; platform-specific resource management bug.
Double free in Kerberos auth path (mongoc_cmd_parts_cleanup called twice); implementation bug, not a spec rule.
SCRAM secret caching keyed incorrectly causing auth failures; caching strategy is implementation detail, not a SCRAM spec rule.
Improvement to deprecate snapshot read concern per SPEC-1033/DRIVERS-454; proactive spec-change implementation, not a prior violation.
Missing extern 'C' guards in change stream header; C/C++ linkage compatibility bug, not a behavioral spec issue.
Sessions spec requires advancing clusterTime from every server response; driver missed handshake/isMaster replies.
Integer overflow in cluster time timestamp comparison causing test assertion failure; CI/test flake investigation.
Evergreen CI config update to test with replica set shards instead of standalone shards; CI infrastructure.
Null pointer dereference segfault in _mongoc_cluster_run_ismaster when stream returns NULL; implementation crash.
Evergreen CI config cleanup: removing deprecated multiple run-on distros syntax; CI infrastructure only.
Sessions spec: all getMore commands MUST use same session ID; change stream forgets implicit session between aggregate and getMore.
APM topology event callbacks not cleared when NULL passed; implementation API bug, no spec rule about callback clearing.
CMake missing LibreSSL include-path discovery via pkg-config; build system gap, no spec behavior.
Renaming CMake ENABLE_SNAPPY option from SYSTEM to ON; build system ergonomics, no spec behavior.
OpenSSL thread/id callbacks not independently unset, causing segfault when multiple extensions share OpenSSL; platform bug.
Missing documentation pages for SDAM monitoring APM callback setters; docs gap only.
Race condition causing assert failure during updateRSFromPrimary; implementation bug in threading/state machine, not a specific spec rule.
Evergreen CI misconfiguration silently skips GSSAPI auth tests; CI infrastructure problem, not spec conformance.
Coverity resource-leak in bson_as_json_visit_document on corrupt BSON; internal memory management defect.
Coverity integer overflow in bson_vsnprintf when size=0; internal C implementation defect, no spec rule.
Coverity integer overflow in bson_strncpy when size=0; internal C implementation defect, no spec rule.
Changing CMake default TLS backend to Secure Transport on macOS and SChannel on Windows; build default policy change.
Porting bson-stdint.h build logic from Autotools to CMake; build system parity work, no spec behavior.
Error domain/code/message not filled when server removed from topology; implementation error-reporting gap, no specific spec rule.
CMake config check for atomic add-and-fetch intrinsics; build system improvement, no spec behavior.
Porting MONGOC_HAVE_WEAK_SYMBOLS compiler check from Autotools to CMake; build system work, no spec behavior.
Internal refactor of mongoc_cmd_parts_assemble to remove duplication; no behavior change, no spec rule.
Internal shared-memory counter optimization: skip atomic increments when shm unavailable; no spec behavior.
Full internal rewrite of mongoc_cursor_t to reduce technical debt; no behavior change claimed, no spec rule.
Change streams spec defines pipeline as array; watch() silently discards bson array input unlike aggregate() which accepts it.
Crash in mongoc_change_stream_next on untested error paths; implementation robustness bug, description too thin for spec rule.
